Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Life aura]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Life aura can make vines and trees look like an emerald bonfire.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Life aura is one of the components in the balance required for Riverseeds to be born.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — The Life Well bolsters the line of life aura.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Life aura is a type of energy Yerin can control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — Infusions of life aura can help stabilize a damaged lifeline.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Scripts direct life aura to Orthos to regenerate his wounds.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — A garden sustains a fruit using life aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Emriss uses life aura to accelerate natural healing.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Life aura can be strengthened through specific forest scripting.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
